comments.text: Waiting 24 days for rain just to capture the tree frogs gliding during their breeding moment — it wasn’t just beautiful, it was deeply inspiring. A fragile life cycle entirely dependent on the weather shows us that nature moves to its own rhythm, and we need to listen more, not interrupt it.
comments.author: @야생의기록

comments.text: Imagine spending months in steamy jungles for that one perfect sighting. It's such a great reminder of why exploring, documenting, and protecting these places matters so much.
